title: First assistant district attorney
doc_html:
§353. First assistant district attorney

           The office of first assistant district attorney for the Sixteenth Judicial District of the state of Louisiana is created.

           Amended by Acts 1966, No. 150, §1.
doc_text:
§353.  First assistant district attorney
The office of first assistant district attorney for the Sixteenth Judicial
District of the state of Louisiana is created.
Amended by Acts 1966, No. 150, §1.
